benefits.description: Fat loss with synergistic effect when MOTS-c added after Retatrutide
Sustained energy throughout the day from MOTS-c
MOTS-c ensures mitochondria works efficiently; Retatrutide creates optimal environment for mitochondrial function

protocol_notes: User has transformation pictures on profile. Protocol: Start Retatrutide first (dose not specified), then add MOTS-c after 2 months. User reports this stacking approach works better than MOTS-c alone, citing that others reported no effects from MOTS-c without the Retatrutide foundation. Retatrutide creates environment for mitochondria to work efficiently before MOTS-c is added.
